mapper.select:
SELECT e.员工编码 AS employee_id, e.员工姓名 AS employee_name, e.部门 AS dept, CAST(COUNT(c.合同编号) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS value FROM EMPLOYEE e INNER JOIN CONTRACT c ON c.创建人编码 = e.员工编码 WHERE e.员工状态 = '在职' AND c.合同状态 NOT IN ('待审核', '已拒绝', '草稿', '作废') AND c.签订时间 IS NOT NULL
AND DATE(c.签订时间) >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE(c.签订时间) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY e.员工编码, e.员工姓名, e.部门 HAVING value > 0 ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT e.员工编码 AS employee_id, e.员工姓名 AS employee_name, e.部门 AS dept, ROUND(SUM(wwi.实际收运数量), 3) AS value FROM EMPLOYEE e INNER JOIN WAREHOUSING w ON w.仓管员编码 = e.员工编码 INNER JOIN WAREHOUSING_WASTE_ITEM wwi ON wwi.入库单编号 = w.入库单编号 WHERE e.员工状态 = '在职' AND wwi.实际收运数量 IS NOT NULL AND wwi.实际收运数量 > 0 AND wwi.实际入库日期 IS NOT NULL
AND DATE(wwi.实际入库日期) >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE(wwi.实际入库日期) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY e.员工编码, e.员工姓名, e.部门 HAVING value > 0 ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT e.员工编码 AS employee_id, e.员工姓名 AS employee_name, e.部门 AS dept, ROUND(SUM(s.结算金额), 2) AS value FROM EMPLOYEE e INNER JOIN SETTLEMENT s ON s.制单人编码 = e.员工编码 WHERE e.员工状态 = '在职' AND s.结算类型 = 'RECEIVABLE' AND s.状态 NOT IN ('草稿', '已驳回') AND s.创建时间 IS NOT NULL
AND DATE(s.创建时间) >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE(s.创建时间) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY e.员工编码, e.员工姓名, e.部门 HAVING value > 0 ORDER BY value DESC
